response.justification: Sarah Smith lacks the core embedded networking and security expertise required for the role. While she has strong general software development skills (C, D, JavaScript, etc.), her experience is heavily web-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with no demonstrated work in embedded firmware, Linux kernel modifications, or networking technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chip knowledge). Her Japanese language proficiency is also unverified.
strengths: Strong general software development skills with experience in multiple languages (C, C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, D)
Proven track record in full-stack and backend development, including low-latency systems
Experience with system-level programming (Node.js, C/C++ for embedded IDEs)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in embedded firmware or networking hardware development
No evidence of Linux kernel source-code modification or security-related development (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X)
